# GNU ddrescue

- **License:** GPL-3.0-or-later
- **Upstream license:** [https://www.gnu.org/software/ddrescue/](https://www.gnu.org/software/ddrescue/)

NexUSB bundles **GNU ddrescue** unmodified from the Ubuntu/Debian archive.
The link above points to the authoritative upstream license; refer to
it for the full and current terms.
